description: A hot air balloon ride over the Pyramids of Giza at dawn is a once in a lifetime experience that you will never forget. Distinguished by its massive entrance and beautiful reliefs from the Book of Caverns and Book of the Earth covering its walls extending tens of meters deep into the mountain. Rated 4.5/5. Indoor. Not wheelchair accessible. Recommended duration: 1 hour. full_address: Karnak Temple Complex, Luxor, Egypt / مجمع معبد الكرنك، الأقصر، مصر
description: The Open Air Museum within Karnak complex displays an exceptional collection of restored small temples, statues and reliefs discovered in the area. Allows viewing of delicate pharaonic architectural details in natural light with excellent photography opportunities. Rated 4.6/5. Outdoor. Limited accessibility. Recommended duration: 1–2 hours. Suitable for: families, solo, couples, friends. / المتحف المفتوح في الهواء الطلق داخل مجمع الكرنك يعرض مجموعة استثنائية من المعابد الصغيرة المرممة والتماثيل والنقوش المكتشفة في المنطقة. يُتيح رؤية تفاصيل معمارية فرعونية دقيقة في الضوء الطبيعي مع إمكانية التصوير الرائع.

full_address: Valley of the Kings, West Bank, Luxor, Egypt / وادي الملوك، البر الغربي، الأقصر، مصر
description: Tomb of Amenhotep II is one of the most beautiful Valley of the Kings tombs of distinctive style. A large number of royal mummies were discovered hidden here for protection from thieves. Distinguished by its six-pillared burial chamber and unique blue paintings. Rated 4.6/5. Indoor. Not wheelchair accessible. Recommended duration: 1 hour. description: Qurna Heritage Village combines the daily life of local residents with their deep-rooted heritage on temple land. full_address: South of Karnak Temple Complex, Luxor, Egypt / جنوب مجمع معبد الكرنك، الأقصر، مصر
description: Temple of Mut is dedicated to the mother goddess Mut, wife of Amun. Located south of Karnak complex surrounded by a sacred crescent-shaped lake. Famous for hundreds of Sekhmet statues dedicated to it by Pharaoh Amenhotep III. Active American archaeological excavations continue here. Rated 4.3/5. Outdoor. Limited accessibility. Recommended duration: 1–2 hours. Suitable for: solo, couples, friends. / معبد موت مخصص لإلهة الأمومة موت زوجة آمون. يقع جنوب مجمع الكرنك محاطاً ببحيرة هلالية مقدسة. اشتهر بمئات تماثيل الإلهة سخمت التي أُهديت إليه من قِبَل الفرعون أمنحتب الثالث. تجري فيه أعمال تنقيب أمريكية نشطة.
